title: Implement idempotent payment retry logic
body:
## Problem
When network failures occur during payment processing, customers sometimes get charged twice because the retry logic doesn't check for existing successful charges.

## Expected Behavior
Retried payments should use an idempotency key to prevent duplicate charges.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Idempotency keys generated per payment attempt
- [ ] Middleware checks for existing successful charges before processing
- [ ] Retry backoff strategy implemented
- [ ] Integration tests for all retry scenarios
author: sarah.chen

comments.author: marcus.johnson
comments.body: I've seen this happen in production logs about 3-4 times this week. Definitely needs to be addressed.

comments.author: sarah.chen
comments.body: PR #247 is up for review. I went with a Redis-backed idempotency key store with a 24h TTL.

comments.author: elena.rodriguez
comments.body: Left some comments on the PR about edge cases with key expiration during long-running transactions.

title: Race condition in concurrent refund processing
body:
## Bug Report
Two concurrent refund requests for the same transaction can both succeed, resulting in double refunds.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Submit a refund request for transaction T1
2. Immediately submit another refund request for T1 before the first completes
3. Both requests succeed

## Impact
Financial loss from double refunds. Identified 12 instances in the last month totaling $4,800.
author: alex.kumar

comments.author: marcus.johnson
comments.body: Confirmed. The `RefundService.process()` method needs a distributed lock. Taking this on.

comments.author: sarah.chen
comments.body: Good catch. This is P0 until fixed.

comments.author: marcus.johnson
comments.body: Fix merged in PR #248. Deployed to staging for verification.

title: International payments fail with null currency code
body:
## Bug Report
**Severity: P0**

International payments submitted without an explicit currency code throw an unhandled NullPointerException in the payment validator. The error surfaces as a generic 500 to the user.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Initiate a payment to an international recipient
2. Omit the `currency_code` field in the request
3. Server returns HTTP 500 instead of 400 validation error

## Expected Behavior
A 400 response with a clear message: 'currency_code is required for international payments'

## Impact
Affecting ~2% of international payment attempts. Approximately 150 failed transactions/day.
author: james.wilson

comments.author: sarah.chen
comments.body: This is a P0. James, can you take this? We need a fix today.

comments.author: james.wilson
comments.body: On it. Root cause identified - the validator doesn't check for null before accessing `currency_code.upper()`. PR incoming.

comments.author: james.wilson
comments.body: PR #251 is up with the fix and tests. Both Sarah and Marcus have approved.

comments.author: priya.patel
comments.body: Confirmed the fix works in staging. The 500 errors have stopped for the test cases.

title: Upgrade Stripe SDK to v12
body: Stripe SDK v10 is approaching end of support. We need to upgrade to v12 which has breaking changes around the Charge/PaymentIntent API surface.
author: alex.kumar

comments.author: alex.kumar
comments.body: PR #249 is up but CI is failing on the webhook handler tests. Need to update the test fixtures for the new event format.

title: Add structured logging to payment pipeline
body: Replace print-based logging with structured JSON logging throughout the payment processing pipeline. This will improve observability in our ELK stack.
author: priya.patel

title: Support multi-currency settlement accounts
body: As we expand internationally, merchants need the ability to hold balances and settle in multiple currencies from a single account.
author: sarah.chen

comments.author: marcus.johnson
comments.body: This is a big one. Should we break it into sub-tasks?

title: Payment webhook delivery fails silently after timeout
body: When webhook delivery to merchants times out, we silently drop the event without logging or retrying. Merchants are missing payment confirmation notifications.
author: marcus.johnson

comments.author: sarah.chen
comments.body: Can we add this to Sprint 24? It's affecting merchant satisfaction.

comments.author: marcus.johnson
comments.body: Added to the sprint. Will implement a retry queue with exponential backoff.

title: Build payment analytics dashboard API
body: Create REST API endpoints for the new payment analytics dashboard. Should provide aggregated metrics for volume, success rates, and latency.
author: priya.patel

comments.author: priya.patel
comments.body: Draft PR #250 is up with the initial volume endpoint. Still working on success rate and latency endpoints.

title: Cart total calculation wrong with discount codes
body:
## Bug Report
When a percentage-based discount code is applied to a cart with items at different tax rates, the total is incorrect. The discount is being applied after tax instead of before.
author: elena.rodriguez

comments.author: priya.patel
comments.body: Reproduced. The issue is in `calculateTotal()` - discount should be applied to subtotal before tax calculation.

comments.author: priya.patel
comments.body: Fixed in PR #113.

title: Redesign checkout flow with multi-step wizard
body:
The current single-page checkout is overwhelming for users. Redesign as a multi-step wizard with clear progress indication.

Design spec: [Figma link]

## Steps
1. Cart review
2. Shipping info
3. Payment method
4. Confirmation
author: elena.rodriguez

comments.author: james.wilson
comments.body: Please make sure we address a11y from the start - focus management between steps is critical.

comments.author: elena.rodriguez
comments.body: PR #112 is up. James, I'll address your accessibility feedback in the next revision.

title: Add Apple Pay and Google Pay support
body: Integrate Apple Pay and Google Pay using the Payment Request API for a streamlined mobile checkout experience.
author: james.wilson

comments.author: elena.rodriguez
comments.body: Approved the PR. Clean implementation!

title: Performance: reduce initial bundle size below 200KB
body: Current initial bundle is 340KB gzipped. Target: under 200KB through code splitting, tree shaking, and lazy loading non-critical components.
author: alex.kumar

comments.author: priya.patel
comments.body: The Vite migration (PR #115) already dropped us to ~280KB. Dynamic imports for the checkout wizard should get us the rest of the way.

title: Add E2E tests for checkout flow
body:
We currently have no E2E tests for the checkout flow. Add Playwright tests covering the critical path:
- Add to cart -> checkout -> payment -> confirmation
- Apply discount code
- Error handling (payment failure, network timeout)
author: priya.patel

title: Shipping address form loses state on browser back
body: When a user fills in the shipping address form, navigates to the payment step, then hits browser back, all form data is lost. Should persist form state in session storage.
author: elena.rodriguez

comments.author: elena.rodriguez
comments.body: Draft PR #116 is up. Testing the session storage approach.

title: Add dark mode support
body: Implement dark mode using CSS custom properties and a theme toggle. Should respect system preference by default.
author: alex.kumar
